name: /spec emitted tests are categorized per the section 2.4 eval spec schema enum
command: mkdir -p tests profiles && printf 'extends: [react:react-docs]\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/spec.sh" "user component renders" --profile profiles/p.yaml --tests-out tests --feature-id feat-x --emit-categories 2>out.txt && grep -qE 'category=(react|node|types|foundation|standards|compliance|prompt|space|hardening|security|tdd|operational|execution|pr-corpus|workflow|rule-engine|source-folder)' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
